testcase.classname: getOptions should support package.json in root directory
testcase.name: getOptions should support package.json in root directory

testcase.classname: getUniqueOutputName should return default junit value if given no preferred prefix
testcase.name: getUniqueOutputName should return default junit value if given no preferred prefix

testcase.classname: getUniqueOutputName should return apply custom prefix value if given prefix
testcase.name: getUniqueOutputName should return apply custom prefix value if given prefix

testcase.classname: replace <rootDir> should replace <rootDir> in output path
testcase.name: replace <rootDir> should replace <rootDir> in output path

testcase.classname: replace <rootDir> should not replace when output has no <rootDir>
testcase.name: replace <rootDir> should not replace when output has no <rootDir>

testcase.classname: replace <rootDir> should not replace when rootDir is null
testcase.name: replace <rootDir> should not replace when rootDir is null

testcase.classname: getTestSuitePropertiesPath should replace <rootDir> in test suite properties path
testcase.name: getTestSuitePropertiesPath should replace <rootDir> in test suite properties path

testcase.classname: getTestSuitePropertiesPath should not replace <rootDir> in test suite properties path when rootDir is not set
testcase.name: getTestSuitePropertiesPath should not replace <rootDir> in test suite properties path when rootDir is not set

testcase.classname: jest-junit should generate valid xml with default name
testcase.name: jest-junit should generate valid xml with default name

testcase.classname: jest-junit should generate valid xml with unique name
testcase.name: jest-junit should generate valid xml with unique name

testcase.classname: jest-junit should generate valid xml despite illegal characters
testcase.name: jest-junit should generate valid xml despite illegal characters

testcase.classname: jest-junit should generate xml at the output filepath defined by JEST_JUNIT_OUTPUT_FILE
testcase.name: jest-junit should generate xml at the output filepath defined by JEST_JUNIT_OUTPUT_FILE

testcase.classname: jest-junit should generate xml at the output filepath defined by outputFile config
testcase.name: jest-junit should generate xml at the output filepath defined by outputFile config

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should contain number of tests in testSuite
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should contain number of tests in testSuite

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should contain number of tests in testSuites
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should contain number of tests in testSuites

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from ancestorTitles when usePathForSuiteName is "false"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from ancestorTitles when usePathForSuiteName is "false"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper filename when suiteNameTemplate is "{filename}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper filename when suiteNameTemplate is "{filename}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should support suiteNameTemplate as function
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should support suiteNameTemplate as function

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when classNameTemplate is "{classname}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when classNameTemplate is "{classname}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper title when classNameTemplate is "{title}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper title when classNameTemplate is "{title}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when classNameTemplate is "{filepath}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when classNameTemplate is "{filepath}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper filename when classNameTemplate is "{filename}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper filename when classNameTemplate is "{filename}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper displayName when classNameTemplate is Unit Tests
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper displayName when classNameTemplate is Unit Tests

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper suitename when classNameTemplate is "{suitename}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper suitename when classNameTemplate is "{suitename}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should support return the function result when classNameTemplate is a function
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should support return the function result when classNameTemplate is a function

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should report no results as error
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should report no results as error

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should report failureMessage if testExecErrorNotSet
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should report failureMessage if testExecErrorNotSet

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should include a failing testcase from a suite with passing testcases but a failure from "testExecError"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should include a failing testcase from a suite with passing testcases but a failure from "testExecError"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should not include a failing testcase from a suite with passing testcases but a null value from "testExecError"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should not include a failing testcase from a suite with passing testcases but a null value from "testExecError"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should report empty suites as error
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should report empty suites as error

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should honor templates when test has errors
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should honor templates when test has errors

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when titleTemplate is "{filepath}"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when titleTemplate is "{filepath}"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when suiteNameTemplate is "{filepath}" and usePathForSuiteName is "false"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper filepath when suiteNameTemplate is "{filepath}" and usePathForSuiteName is "false"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from ancestorTitles when suiteNameTemplate is set to "{title}" and usePathForSuiteName is "true"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from ancestorTitles when suiteNameTemplate is set to "{title}" and usePathForSuiteName is "true"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from testFilePath when usePathForSuiteName is "true"; no appDirectory set
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from testFilePath when usePathForSuiteName is "true"; no appDirectory set

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from testFilePath when usePathForSuiteName is "true"; with appDirectory set
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper name from testFilePath when usePathForSuiteName is "true"; with appDirectory set

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when ancestorSeparator is default
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when ancestorSeparator is default

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when ancestorSeparator is customized
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the proper classname when ancestorSeparator is customized

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should parse failure messages for failing tests
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should parse failure messages for failing tests

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should parse messages without stack trace when notStackTrace set to true and jest >= 26.3.0
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should parse messages without stack trace when notStackTrace set to true and jest >= 26.3.0

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should parse messages with stack trace when notStackTrace set to false and jest >= 26.3.0
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should parse messages with stack trace when notStackTrace set to false and jest >= 26.3.0

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should parse failure messages for failing tests and not crash when notStackTrace set to true and jest < 26.3.0
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should parse failure messages for failing tests and not crash when notStackTrace set to true and jest < 26.3.0

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should support displayName template var for jest multi-project
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should support displayName template var for jest multi-project

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should not return the file name by default
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should not return the file name by default

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should return the file name when addFileAttribute is "true"
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should return the file name when addFileAttribute is "true"

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should prefix the file name with filePathPrefix
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should prefix the file name with filePathPrefix

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should show output of console if includeConsoleOutput is true
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should show output of console if includeConsoleOutput is true

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should NOT show output of console if includeConsoleOutput is not set or false
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should NOT show output of console if includeConsoleOutput is not set or false

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should show short console output if includeShortConsoleOutput is true
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should show short console output if includeShortConsoleOutput is true

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should NOT show short console output if includeShortConsoleOutput is not set or false
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should NOT show short console output if includeShortConsoleOutput is not set or false

testcase.classname: buildJsonResults should add properties to testcase (non standard)
testcase.name: buildJsonResults should add properties to testcase (non standard)

testcase.classname: quick suite should pass
testcase.name: quick suite should pass
